verses.2: He covers himself with light as with a garment.
verses.3: He lays the beams of his rooms in the waters.
verses.5: He laid the foundations of the earth,
verses.6: You covered it with the deep as with a cloak.
verses.9: You have set a boundary that they may not pass over,
verses.10: He sends springs into the valleys.
verses.11: They give drink to every animal of the field.
verses.12: The birds of the sky nest by them.
verses.13: He waters the mountains from his rooms.
verses.14: He causes the grass to grow for the livestock,
verses.15: wine that makes the heart of man glad,
verses.16: The LORD’s trees are well watered,
verses.17: where the birds make their nests.
verses.18: The high mountains are for the wild goats.
verses.19: He appointed the moon for seasons.
verses.20: You make darkness, and it is night,
verses.21: The young lions roar after their prey,
verses.22: The sun rises, and they steal away,
verses.23: Man goes out to his work,
verses.24: LORD, how many are your works!
verses.25: There is the sea, great and wide,
verses.28: You give to them; they gather.
verses.29: You hide your face; they are troubled.
verses.30: You send out your Spirit and they are created.
verses.31: Let the LORD’s glory endure forever.
verses.32: He looks at the earth, and it trembles.
verses.33: I will sing to the LORD as long as I live.
verses.34: Let my meditation be sweet to him.
verses.35: Let sinners be consumed out of the earth.
